headline: Worried about Strait of Hormuz inflation to come? The world economy has one word for you: Plastics
summary: Worried about consumer inflation to come from Strait of Hormuz closure? The economy has one word for you other than oil: plastics.

headline: What Moved Markets This Week
summary: U.S. stocks ended lower on the week as elevated U.S.-Iran tensions remained in focus. Read more about this week's major events on Wall Street.

headline: Marco Rubio Says US-Iran War To End In 'Weeks, Not Months' And No Ground Troops Needed
summary: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio outlines a near-term end to Iran operations, highlights troop flexibility, and warns of energy market disruptions from the conflict.
